latHint: Think establishing your own space - not cutting meat.
pivHint: A butcher will CARVE the meat - but to CARVE out your place in the world means what?
winText: Making your mark. CARVE was the pivot - butcher's cut to carving out a NICHE.
lossText: NICHE - a specialized place or role. CARVE was the pivot: butcher's cut to carving a NICHE.
